name: Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Adani One ICICI Bank terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 6,00,000 and above in a calendar year
Flight voucher on completing Rs 25,000 spends within 60 days of card activation
additionalBenefits: 7% reward points on Adani One ecosystem, Adani-managed airports, Trainman, gas, electricity and more
1.5% Adani reward points on other domestic spend categories excluding fuel and rent
2% Adani reward points on international spends
4 complimentary domestic lounge accesses per quarter
2 complimentary international lounge accesses per year
50% off up to Rs 500 twice every month on BookMyShow

salaried: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
